SEARCH
Package com.shapeville.utils

Class Constants

java.lang.Object
com.shapeville.utils.Constants
public final class Constants extends Object
Utility class containing constant values used throughout the Shapeville application. This class should not be instantiated.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    ANGLE_TYPE_PANEL_ID
